CHAR 6
ACO_ID ACO_ID ACO Identifier ACO Identifier. Format: A#### CHAR 5
NPI_Name NPI_NAME Name of Provider Associated with the NPI Name of provider associated with the NPI as recorded in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership System (PECOS) CHAR 100
TIN_LBN TIN_LBN TIN Legal Business Name Legal business name associated with the ACO participant TIN included on the ACO's certified participant list used in financial reconciliation CHAR 100
ACO_NAME ACO_NAME ACO Name ACO Doing
